description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, deploy, and post-deploy using the default alpine:latest Docker image. Add a post-deploy job named check-links that runs only on the master branch, uses the node:latest image, and executes the commands npm install broken-link-checker -g, blc --help, and blc https://hnsuite.com -rog --filter-level 3. Add a deploy job named pages that runs on changes to website/* on the master branch, uses the default alpine image, runs cd website, mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public ../public, then publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Add another deploy job named publish that runs only for tag pipelines, uses the default alpine image, runs rm -rf website, rm -rf .git, rm .gitignore, and rm .gitlab-ci.yml, and stores the entire repository (path "/") as an artifact.
